name: Value Objects & Invariants
tagline: Smart enums with data, quantities, ranges, and derived fields.
description: A focused Catalog context that showcases Koine's value-modelling toolkit: smart enums whose members carry associated data, regex- and string-op-validated value objects, a unit-checked quantity, an interval Range, uniqueness sets, optional and derived fields, and natural-key identity. The most concentrated tour of value objects and invariants.
teaches: smart enums whose members carry associated data
value objects with regex and string-operation invariants
